calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Court dismissed case filed by plaintiff, MARY GOFORTH, at the request of plaintiff per correspondence of 9/19/02. Court dimissed case filed by plaintiff, HAZEL NEY. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by LaVon Granger. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2003 Continued To Nov-17-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Each Plaintiff in Propria Persona remaining in the case is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 11/17/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Joann Prior. (212)
